commit_scope: Add Form/BML-native route-goal attention cells, lift /api/attention/kernel-runtime into the RouteCell route-data surface, and teach the runtime-surface sensor to see higher-grammar route-data refs.

commands: cd /Users/ursmuff/.claude-worktrees/Coherence-Network/native-north-star-parallel-20260608 && python3 scripts/gen_bp_table.py && python3 -m json.tool form/form-stdlib/blueprint-registry.json >/tmp/native-route-goal-registry.json && python3 scripts/scan_form_blueprints.py --check

cd /Users/ursmuff/.claude-worktrees/Coherence-Network/native-north-star-parallel-20260608/form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/tests/source-language-route-class-template-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Route-goal source and binary proofs both returned 65535 with 1 ok, 0 divergent. The proof uses live production runtime-event observations sampled on 2026-06-08: /api/meetings/anonymous-traces 197 calls p50 111ms p95 1082ms 66 errors; /api/workspaces/coherence-network/vitality 86 calls p50 78ms p95 262ms; /api/ideas 63 calls p50 489ms p95 1619ms; /api/household/events 64 calls p50 2ms p95 126ms; /api/substrate/form 43 calls p50 6ms p95 9ms. The route-goal band selected /api/meetings/anonymous-traces as the highest-pressure high-grammar handler candidate after north-star fit weighting. The first attempted repo-local pytest command used api/.venv/bin/pytest, but this fresh worktree has no api/.venv; the focused test was rerun with the available pytest and passed.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Production verification is pending until PR checks pass, the branch is merged, deployment completes, and public verification runs.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The native front-door loop can now rank observed API routes in Form/BML using traffic, p50/p95 latency, errors, handler grammar, native state, user flow, and north-star fit; /api/attention/kernel-runtime is authored through the higher-grammar RouteCell route-data surface and still loads as a native-kernel route.

phase_gate.notes: Local source, binary, route-surface, manifest, and production-router harness proofs pass. CI, PR review, merge, deploy, and public verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/native-route-goal-cells.fk defines NATIVE-ROUTE-OBS, NATIVE-ROUTE-ATTENTION, and NATIVE-ROUTE-GOAL cells with flow and north-star fit so route promotion is not frequency-only.

form/form-stdlib/tests/native-route-goal-cells-band.fk returns 65535 across source and binary sibling-kernel execution, and includes a scaled fit calculation that avoided a TypeScript integer overflow divergence found during validation.

deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk now declares AttentionKernelRuntimeRoute as RouteCell<KernelHTTPRequest, KernelHTTPResponse> and binds it through kh-route-data-ref rather than the raw path/handler row.
deploy/kernel-router/production-routes-data.json carries the /api/attention/kernel-runtime route metadata for the route-data ref.
scripts/runtime_surface_report.py resolves kh-route-data-ref rows through production-routes-data.json, so lifted higher-grammar route declarations remain visible in the kernel-first capable count.
python3 scripts/runtime_surface_report.py --json reports total_routes=812, kernel_served_routes=22, kernel_first_capable_routes=23, with /api/attention/kernel-runtime visible from the route-data ref.

python3 form/form-kernel-rust/production_routes_harness.py passed after rebase: all 109 promoted utility route checks value-identical to the local CPython oracle, /api/attention/kernel-runtime returned 200 with X-Form-Router=native-kernel, fan-out /api/health still flowed, and native p50 was 0.649ms vs CPython p50 13.219ms in the final run.
